title: Goldman Sachs' Lloyd Blankfein warns Iran war fallout 'is going to last' even if 'there's a resolution tomorrow'
summary_full: Goldman Sachs' Lloyd Blankfein urged investors to prioritize contingency planning as Iran war rattles markets.
